headline: 5 High-Yield Dividend Kings Down Over the Past Year Are 2026 Bargains
summary: Companies that have raised dividends for shareholders for 50 years or more are the kinds of investments passive income investors need to own. Dependability is crucial for individuals seeking to increase their annual income through dividend stock investments. headline: RBC Capital Trims PPG Target as Macro Uncertainty Persists
summary: PPG Industries, Inc. (NYSE:PPG) is included among the 15 Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Income. On March 19, RBC Capital lowered its price recommendation on PPG Industries, Inc. (NYSE:PPG) to $114 from $115. It kept a Sector Perform rating after meeting with the company’s Investor Relations team. The firm said demand across industrial end […]
